payload.long_description: Partial/edge-cropped view of a dark brown stained wooden cabinet front or top panel, horizontal rectangular face with a slightly recessed center and darker surrounding frame, matte/underlit finish with faint surface wear and discoloration; appears close to the camera (approximately 0.6 m away).
